name: mem0-oss
description: Connect Codex to any self-hosted Mem0 OSS MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Use a self-hosted Mem0 OSS MCP bridge from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Mem0 OSS connects Codex to a self-hosted Mem0 MCP bridge. Use the bundled installer to target any bridge URL without editing upstream files.
